definition: A specific pre-market/open trading model for US equity index futures (and crypto during US hours). Uses the 90-minute pre-market range as the accumulation phase, then trades the sweep + reversal at market open. Venom is ICT's most structured intraday model — every step has exact timing.
depends_on: liquidity_sweep (pre-market high/low get swept at open)
fair_value_gaps (entry is the FVG created by displacement)
silver_bullet (overlaps with NY AM Silver Bullet window)
feeds_into: entry_models (Venom = structured intraday model for US equity futures)
ICT_2022_model (Venom is a specific implementation of the 2022 model for market open)
composes: liquidity_sweep (pre-market high/low get swept at open)
fair_value_gaps (entry is the FVG created by post-sweep displacement)
consequent_encroachment (CE of the FVG = precision entry)
silver_bullet (Venom overlaps with NY AM Silver Bullet window)

before_8am.task_1: Determine daily bias from overnight/HTF analysis
before_8am.task_2: Mark NDOG (previous day close to current open) and NWOG if Monday
before_8am.task_3: Note any pending news events (8:30 ET releases: CPI, NFP, retail sales)
before_8am.task_4: If high-impact news at 8:30, WAIT until after news before marking pre-market range

step_1_accumulation.action: Mark the 90-minute pre-market range high and low
step_1_accumulation.detail: This range represents where overnight orders have accumulated. The high and low are liquidity targets.
step_1_accumulation.note: If news at 8:30, the 'real' range may be 8:35-9:30 (post-news)

step_2_manipulation.action: Watch for sweep of pre-market HIGH or LOW at market open
step_2_manipulation.bullish_signal: Pre-market LOW is swept (SSL taken) → expect bullish reversal
step_2_manipulation.bearish_signal: Pre-market HIGH is swept (BSL taken) → expect bearish reversal
step_2_manipulation.no_signal: If neither is swept by 9:45, Venom is invalid for the day — wait for Silver Bullet

step_3_confirmation.action: Wait for displacement + FVG in the OPPOSITE direction of the sweep
step_3_confirmation.requirement: Displacement candle must be 3+ ATR. FVG must be visible on M5/M15.
step_3_confirmation.bonus: CHoCH on M5 = highest confidence. BOS on M15 = secondary confirmation.

step_4_entry.action: Enter on FVG fill or CE of the FVG
step_4_entry.sl: Beyond the pre-market sweep extreme (the manipulation wick)
step_4_entry.tp1: NDOG CE or opposite pre-market range extreme

step_5_management.action: Partial close 50% at TP1 → move SL to breakeven → trail to TP2
step_5_management.exit_deadline: Close any remaining position by 12:00 PM ET (lunch = low liquidity)

applicable_to.note: Primary — Venom was designed for S&P 500 futures
Excellent — Nasdaq is more volatile, wider SLs needed
Good — Dow follows same pattern but lower volume
Works during US hours — CME BTC futures create the same pattern
Works but less reliable — ETH has more random overnight moves

news_venom.best_for: CPI/NFP/retail sales days — news creates the initial spike, then Venom plays the reversal
news_venom.warning: Wider SL needed — news creates deeper sweeps

crypto_venom.best_for: BTC/ETH during weekdays when CME is active
crypto_venom.note: Use CME BTC price for range boundaries, trade on spot exchange

failure_conditions: No sweep by 9:45 ET → Venom is invalid, wait for Silver Bullet at 10:00
Both pre-market high AND low swept → confused market, skip the day
Sweep + displacement in SAME direction (not reversal) → this is a breakout, not Venom
Low-liquidity day (holiday, half-day) → Venom is unreliable

scoring.classic_venom_setup: +10 to ICT score (complete pattern with all steps)
scoring.venom_in_silver_bullet: +12 to ICT score (Venom overlaps with 10:00-11:00 window)
scoring.partial_venom: +5 to ICT score (sweep occurred but weak displacement)

bridge_integration.auto_detection: Mark pre-market range at 9:30 ET. Watch for sweep of high/low until 9:45.
bridge_integration.time_gate: Only active 9:30-10:30 ET on weekdays. Disabled on weekends and holidays.
bridge_integration.symbols: Apply to US500, US100, US30, BTCUSD, ETHUSD only
bridge_integration.connection_to_silver_bullet: If Venom triggers at 9:30-9:45, the FVG entry at 10:00-10:30 is ALSO a Silver Bullet entry
